main_event: Three youths on way to school observed small spherical object moving slowly away over Dayton, Ohio for 10 minutes on 21 March 1958.
sighted_object: small spherical object; slowly moving away
witness_description: Three youths on way to school; civilian observers
interesting_points: Weather balloon released from Sulphur Grove at 0640, winds 25 MPH from N-NW, consistent with path over Dayton
No radar targets found 0730-0830 by 58th ACW Radar Division (Capt. H.R. Shepherd); no UFOs on radar
No other reports from any other person in Dayton
ATIC evaluation: object without doubt was a balloon, probably from WX unit northwest of Dayton
Balloon from Sulphur Grove believed to have initiated the sighting; rpt turned in at 0820
